com.hp.workpath.api.scanner

Class ScanAttributes.MeBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<ScanAttributes.MeBuilder>
      • com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.MeBuilder
  • Enclosing class:
    ScanAttributes

    public static class ScanAttributes.MeBuilder
extends ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<ScanAttributes.MeBuilder>
    Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images back to the client.
    Since:
    API 1

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      MeBuilder()
      Constructor to create a new ScanToMe Builder for sending scanned images back to the application with default attributes.

      Color Mode = DEFAULT
      Document Format = DEFAULT
      Scan Size = DEFAULT
      Resolution = DEFAULT

    • Method Summary

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ScanAttributes build(ScanAttributesCaps caps)
      Combines all of the attributes in this into a ScanAttributes object.
      ScanAttributes.MeBuilder setFolderName(java.lang.String folderName)
      Sets the folder name to be stored after scanning

      • Methods inherited from class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder

        setAutomaticStraightenMode, setAutomaticToneMode, setBackgroundCleanup, setBlankImageRemovalMode, setCaptureMode, setColorDropoutMode, setColorMode, setContrastAdjustment, setCredentials, setCropMode, setCustomLength, setCustomWidth, setDarknessAdjustment, setDocumentFormat, setDuplex, setEraseBackMargin, setEraseFrontMargin, setEraseMarginUnit, setFileName, setFileOptionsAttributes, setJobAssemblyMode, setMaxPagesPerAttachment, setMediaSource, setMediaWeightAdjustment, setMisfeedDetectionMode, setOrientation, setOutputQuality, setProgressDialogMode, setResolution, setScanPreview, setScanSize, setSharpnessAdjustment, setSplitAttachmentByPage, setTextPhotoOptimization, setTransmissionMode

    • Constructor Detail

      • MeBuilder

        public MeBuilder()
        Constructor to create a new ScanToMe Builder for sending scanned images back to the application with default attributes.

        Color Mode = DEFAULT
        Document Format = DEFAULT
        Scan Size = DEFAULT
        Resolution = DEFAULT

        Since:
        API 1

    • Method Detail

      • setFolderName

        public ScanAttributes.MeBuilder setFolderName(java.lang.String folderName)
        Sets the folder name to be stored after scanning
        Parameters:
        folderName - base folder for scanned images
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Since:
        API 1

      • build

        public ScanAttributes build(ScanAttributesCaps caps)
                     throws CapabilitiesExceededException
        Combines all of the attributes in this into a ScanAttributes object.
        Specified by:
        build in class ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<ScanAttributes.MeBuilder>
        Parameters:
        caps - The scan capabilities.
        Returns:
        ScanAttributes object containing all of the attributes.
        Throws:
        CapabilitiesExceededException - if caps does not contain the set attribute value.
        Since:
        API 1
